headline: Innodata Delivers 48% Growth in 2025: Can 2026 Surpass It?
summary: INOD reports 48% revenue growth in 2025 and sees 35%+ growth in 2026. Can its AI push and margin expansion drive another breakout year?

headline: Is Cognizant (CTSH) Pricing Reflecting Its Recent Share Price Slide And DCF Upside Potential
summary: If you are wondering whether Cognizant Technology Solutions is attractively priced right now, it helps to first compare the current share price with what the business might actually be worth. The stock recently closed at US$64.43, with a 5.4% return over the past week, set against a 21.5% decline over 30 days and a 20.7% fall year to date that may have shifted how investors view both opportunity and risk. Recent news coverage has focused on Cognizant's position in the broader software and IT...

headline: How The Cognizant (CTSH) Investment Story Is Shifting With AI Hopes And Execution Risks
summary: Cognizant Technology Solutions has seen its modeled fair value edge from US$90.88 to US$90.20, a shift of less than 1% that signals only a subtle recalibration rather than a major reset. That small move sits against a backdrop of active analyst coverage, where some firms are lifting price targets and others trimming them as they weigh AI driven opportunity against execution risk and mixed target revisions. As you read on, you will see how to keep track of this evolving story and what to watch...
